mapper.select: SELECT id, app_id, tenant_id, icon_id, app_name_cn, app_name_en, app_desc_cn, app_desc_en, app_type, app_sub_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status = 1

SELECT id, app_id, tenant_id, icon_id, app_name_cn, app_name_en, app_desc_cn, app_desc_en, app_type, app_sub_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_t WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_t (id, app_id, tenant_id, icon_id, app_name_cn, app_name_en, app_desc_cn, app_desc_en, app_type, app_sub_type, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{iconId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appNameCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appDescCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appDescEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{appSubType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_app_t WHERE app_name_cn = #{nameCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_app_t WHERE app_name_en = #{nameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.app_id, a.tenant_id, a.icon_id, a.app_name_cn, a.app_name_en, a.app_desc_cn, a.app_desc_en, a.app_type, a.app_sub_type, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.last_update_by, a.last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_t a INNER JOIN openplatform_app_member_t m ON a.id = m.app_id WHERE m.account_id = #{accountId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND a.status = 1 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY a.last_update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pageSize,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM openplatform_app_t a INNER JOIN openplatform_app_member_t m ON a.id = m.app_id WHERE m.account_id = #{accountId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND a.status = 1 AND m.status = 1

SELECT id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_p_t WHERE parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_p_t (id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{propertyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3))

INSERT INTO openplatform_app_p_t ( id, parent_id, property_name, property_value, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.propertyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.propertyValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{item.lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT value FROM openplatform_property_t WHERE path = #{path} AND code LIKE CONCAT(#{codePrefix}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY code
